PathOfBuilding.Notes:
Leveling: Supports: ^xE05030 ^xE05030Chance to bleed^7 0 ^xE05030Maim^7 8 ^x70FF70Faster Attacks^7 8 ^xE05030Melee Physical^7 18 ^xE05030Volatility^7 18 ^x70FF70Culling Strike Support^7 18 ^x70FF70Deadly Ailments^7 18 ^xE05030Urgent Orders^7 31 ^xE05030Fortify^7 31 ^xE05030More Duration^7 31 ^x70FF70Swift Affliction^7 31 ^xE05030 Eternal Blessing ^734^7 ^xE05030Brutality ^738
^7 Active:^7^xC8C8C8 ^xE05030Shield Charge^7 4 ^x7070FFFlame Dash^7 10 ^xE05030^xE05030Sunder^7 12 ^x70FF70Lacerate^7 12 (buy of haemorraging asap) ^xE05030Bladestorm^7 28
Extra: ^xE05030War Banner^7 4 ^xE05030Vitality ^710 ^xE05030Enduring Cry^7 10 ^x70FF70Blood Rage ^716^7^7 ^xE05030Molten Shell ^716^7^7 ^x7070FFAutomation ^724^7^7 ^xE05030Vulnerability ^724^7^7 ^xE05030Pride^7 24
Early links:
^xE05030Sunder^7 - ^xE05030Melee Physical^7 - ^xE05030Chance to Bleed^7 - ^xB97123^xE05030Brutality^7^xE05030 ^xE05030Shield Charge^7 - ^x70FF70Faster attacks^7 ^x7070FFAutomation^7 - ^xE05030Molten Shell^7 - ^x70FF70Blood Rage^7
Don't wait until late to use your supplemental skills like curse/blood rage/war banner this gives a lot of dps bonus Until you get the max% block wheel find some alternate source of block ( need 8% and shield doesn't count ) Boots/body/helmet/gloves MUST have armor when you get the armor mastery!! Takes ~500 alts to roll a good tincture using t2 mods with either effect mod better than buying usually DPS on your axe does not matter, all that matters is highest maximum physical damage If you don't have Tempest boots you should be using Jagged technique If using tempest boots you must have a venopuncture to apply chill (or some other source of permanent ele ailment but veno is easiest)
Items: Core + expensive: Ryslathia's Coil: 36+ max hit 2d+ (use attack quality for higher roll) Ashes of the stars: 27%+ quality (only when using lacerate of bleeding, these are MUCH cheaper early league you should aim to buy one day 2 to save) ~5d+ Blood sap tincture: +damage over time multi (mandatory) + effect (important) ~500 alts usually cheaper to self craft
Core + cheap: Lacerate of haemorrage Cheap but *requires* quality, so before using it run labs for +quality divint font craft, it isn't worth buying a 20% people overcharge Jack the axe (expensive at league start but worth it bc nobody has good axes yet) Venopuncture 1c Tempest rising ~40-100c azadi crest 5c (look for a great roll these are very cheap and mandatory for the build)
Bonus: Light of meaning increased physical (10-20d) lethal pride (+%hp min x2 max x4) 1-30d
Rare mods:
Jewel: Max life global physical damage physical damage with axes physical damage over time faster ailments
Amulet: life res spell suppress damage over time multi physical damage over time multi added phys
Ring: Damage over time multi Added phys Life Res
Body: Increased max life % (craft) life res spell suppress
Boots: Move speed life res spell suppress
Gloves: Attack speed Phys damage Life res spell suppress
Helmet: life res spell suppress
annoints: Veteran soldier: (teal,indigo,gold) Damage S Influence: (verdant,teal,gold) Damage S Acrimony: (Black, Black, Black) Damage A Master of Wounds: (Clear, Teal, Violet) Damage B Retaliation: (verdant,opal,crimson) Damage C + aspd + defenses Harvester of foes: (clear,amber,indigo) Damage C Defiance: (amber,teal,black) Damage C + defenses + block chance
Imbue: (* = priority) (I swapped green and red on accident) ^x70FF70Helmet-green-any: Vulnerability curse effect * Helmet-green-2+: max lightning res^7 ^xE05030^xB97123Helmet-red-any: Ailment duration * Helmet-red-any: Increased attack damage^7^7 ^x70FF70boot-green-any: action speed * boot-green-any: sapped ground (-6% dmg)^7 ^x70FF70boot-green-2: max fire res^7 ^xB97123boot-red-5: bleeds you inflict deal damage faster * boot-red-any: chance to avoid ailments ^x70FF70body-green-any: increased effect of non-curse auras from your skills * body-green-any: increased effect of your curses body-green-any: damage recouped as life body-green-2: all max res (ideal if 2% but that requires using grand + conflict orb gamble) body-green-any: gain an endurance charge every x seconds (take charge duration mastery for full endurance charges in boss fights if over 12s)^7 ^xB97123body-red-any: pride has increased aura effect^7^7 * ^x70FF70glove-green-any: increased attack speed glove-green-any: add physical damage to attacks glove-green-any: physical damage over time multiplier * glove-green-2: maximum cold res^7 ^xB97123glove-red-any: chance to aggravate bleeding on targets you hit with attacks (mid because we take jagged anyways)^7 *

Skill.label: Spectral Throw (swap in Faster Attacks for bosses)

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE The Light of Meaning Prismatic Jewel Variant: Life Variant: Energy Shield Variant: Mana Variant: Armour Variant: Evasion Rating Variant: Attributes Variant: Global Crit Chance Variant: Physical Damage Variant: Lightning Damage Variant: Cold Damage Variant: Fire Damage Variant: Chaos Damage Variant: Chaos Resistance Selected Variant: 8 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to Maximum Life {variant:2}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 3% increased Energy Shield {variant:3}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to Maximum Mana {variant:4}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 7% increased Armour {variant:5}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 7% increased Evasion Rating {variant:6}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +2 to all Attributes {variant:7}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 5% Increased Global Critical Strike Chance {variant:8}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Physical Damage {variant:9}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Lightning Damage {variant:10}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Cold Damage {variant:11}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Fire Damage {variant:12}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Chaos Damage {variant:13}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +4% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: UNIQUE The Tempest Rising Goliath Greaves Armour: 384 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.0243 Unique ID: 1e9d0bc663e2c6165cad675262d934e00c14e61a111ec1649024a89d1b2db706 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-G-B LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 0 80% increased Armour 30% increased Movement Speed 16% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies Damaging Ailments deal damage 24% faster You and Enemies in your Presence count as moving while affected by Elemental Ailments

Rarity: MAGIC Scholar's Basalt Flask of the Tortoise Unique ID: 7a98553afecb4bc8cfd252dc754060a1cb946dfe53f73aafc7d1b71cbdcf4655 Item Level: 65 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Used when an adjacent Flask is used Taunts nearby Enemies on use 19% reduced Charges per use 48% increased Armour during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Ample Granite Flask of the Impala Unique ID: 2c4794aaad6516a80f66e60e5b140aa9fa2cfb9d373fed41bbe870dbbe77b0f8 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full +35 to Maximum Charges 56% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Venopuncture Iron Ring Unique ID: fcb77230efb28f6836f0306a55dd9a3dfb9d56bbe4061835178aedac83981d75 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 49 Implicits: 1 Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks +22 to Strength Attacks have 30% chance to cause Bleeding 72% increased Damage with Bleeding You are Chilled while you are Bleeding Non-Chilled Enemies you inflict Bleeding on are Chilled Bleeding Enemies you Kill with Hits Shatter

Rarity: RELIC Ashes of the Stars Onyx Amulet Unique ID: 10e8eaa1d5b0d8fb5be977c02ea405df5b2e0555bc4d4733e1205e4e5a3f4eb6 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Veteran Soldier +16 to all Attributes 9% increased Experience Gain of Gems +1 to Level of all Skill Gems +29% to Quality of all Skill Gems

Rarity: MAGIC Horticultural Blood Sap Tincture of Dissolution Unique ID: d583ad410ddd5e75ee05596ba5b06afbe029ce47139f2edc22f2776fed0b95cd Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 29% chance to cause Bleeding with Melee Weapons 128% increased Damage with Bleeding from Melee Weapons 22% increased effect +48% to Damage over Time Multiplier with Melee Weapon Attacks

Rarity: MAGIC Sapping Divine Life Flask of Grounding Unique ID: 9aefd44455e6c51e4414a6ce636e8859c97529ba79ee0ade95a286708fba9a67 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 0 60% increased Life Recovered Removes 10% of Life Recovered from Mana when used Grants Immunity to Shock for 10 seconds if used while Shocked

Rarity: UNIQUE Lethal Pride Timeless Jewel Item Level: 86 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 Commanded leadership over 14547 warriors under Akoya Passives in radius are Conquered by the Karui Historic

Rarity: RARE Gloves Chimerascale Gauntlets Armour: 299 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 244 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.338}AddedPhysicalDamage4 Prefix: {range:0.366}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: {range:0.845}LocalBaseArmourAndLife2 Suffix: {range:0.697}IncreasedAttackSpeed3 Suffix: {range:0.817}ChaosResist5 Suffix: {range:0.31}LightningResist7 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 1 {tags:dot_multi,physical_damage,damage,physical}{exarch}{range:0.5}+(11-13)% to Physical Damage over Time Multiplier Adds 5 to 9 Physical Damage to Attacks 12% increased Attack Speed +46 to Armour +147 to maximum Life +43% to Lightning Resistance +29% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: UNIQUE Azadi Crest Lacquered Buckler Evasion: 598 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.2963 Item Level: 78 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-G-R LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 1 6% increased Movement Speed +98 to maximum Life +5% Chance to Block 7% chance to avoid Projectiles Your Lucky or Unlucky effects use the best or worst from three rolls instead of two

Rarity: RARE Hypnotic Hunger Reaver Axe Unique ID: 10fdd9419f162abc6ac392e2ac0ad7f689cc9059de78ff4e97415ec73b97457a Elder Item Item Level: 83 Quality: 29 Sockets: B-R-R LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 1 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Physical Modifier magnitudes 190% increased Physical Damage Adds 25 to 43 Physical Damage 25% chance to Blind Enemies on hit +42% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding from Hits with this Weapon Hits with this Weapon have Culling Strike against Bleeding Enemies {crafted}+21% to Physical Damage over Time Multiplier
